data.title: Lantern Unveils Agentic Commerce Platform to Maximize Revenue in AI Shopping
data.description: A new platform, Lantern, launched in Chicago on July 1, 2026, offers a free service for ecommerce teams to enhance product visibility, selection, and conversion through AI technology. This platform assists ecommerce brands in evaluating and enhancing the effectiveness of their product presentation for improved user engagement and conversion rates.

data.title: Monster Energy Up & Up Festival Announces OMNOM as Fall 2026 Headliner for College Tour - Tenth Anniversary Edition
data.description: In Corona, California on July 1, 2026, it was reported that OMNOM, a highly sought-after house music producer, has been named as the headliner for the Fall 2026 tour of the Monster Energy Up & Up Festival. This festival is recognized as the longest-running college music tour in the United States. The announcement of OMNOM as the headliner signifies a milestone as it will be the festival's tenth year of operation.

data.title: CSG expands its U.S. presence with launch of CSG Land Systems North America
data.description: Today, the global industrial and technology conglomerate CSG unveiled its latest venture in the United States - CSG Land Systems North America. Based in Michigan, this new subsidiary will serve as the representative for three established suppliers of equipment to NATO in the U.S. These suppliers include Excalibur Army, Tatra Defence, and Tatra Trucks. The primary objective of this subsidiary is to enhance CSG's presence in the U.S. market by focusing on the expansion of self-propelled artillery systems and high-mobility tactical vehicles. This strategic move is in line with CSG's efforts to bolster its defense manufacturing operations and workforce in the U.S., reflecting the company's commitment to growth and innovation in this sector.

data.title: Subaru Brataroo to Make UK Debut at Goodwood Festival of Speed
data.description: Subaru Motorsports USA is slated to participate in the Goodwood Festival of Speed Hillclimb Shootout from July 9 to July 12, 2026, in Camden, New Jersey. Travis Pastrana is gearing up for the UK debut of the Subaru Brataroo 9500 Turbo at this renowned event, characterized as one of the top platforms in motorsport.

data.title: The Richman Group Names Abby Perez Director of Development to Support Southwest Expansion
data.description: On July 1, 2026, in Phoenix, Abby Perez was appointed as the Director of Development for the Richman Group of Arizona by the Richman Group Development Corp. This appointment aims to enhance the company's affordable and multifamily development presence in Arizona and the broader Southwest region. Perez's role will involve overseeing the expansion and management of development projects in the area.

data.title: Facilio Ushers In The AI-Native Era Of CMMS
data.description: In a recent development, Facilio Inc. has introduced advanced AI capabilities designed specifically for facility management tasks. This innovation aims to streamline and expedite facilities operations, enhancing efficiency and accessibility. The announcement was made on July 1, 2026, in New York. The upgraded Connected CMMS platform signifies a transition towards a more automated approach, eliminating the complexity of traditional workflows. This integration of AI technology is set to revolutionize the sector by offering faster and simplified solutions for running facilities.

data.title: Nuvve Launches Monthly “European Power Market Brief”
data.description: In San Diego, Nuvve Holding Corp. (NVVE) announced the release of the European Power Market Brief, a new monthly report that delves into price fluctuations, market influences, and forecasts for European day-ahead and balancing markets. The initial edition (Issue 01, July 2026) examines data from June 2026 and provides insights for the future. Nuvve, a Nasdaq-listed company, focuses on clean-energy technology, particularly in grid-scale battery energy storage and V2G solutions. The European Power Market Brief offers this information for free and aims to assist stakeholders in navigating the energy landscape.

data.title: Rekor Systems Launches Rekor Scout Axis Agent With Go-Secure.Video: Bringing Trusted and Tamper-Evident Video to Standard Axis Cameras
data.description: Rekor has launched a new Go-Secure.Video agent that allows its customers to ensure the integrity of videos captured by their existing Axis cameras when utilizing Rekor's advanced vehicle recognition technology. This new agent enables customers to verify the video's integrity right from the moment of capture. It enhances security measures and adds an additional layer of trust to the videos processed through Rekor's system. This new feature aims to boost customer confidence and provide them with transparent and reliable video verification processes.

data.title: Gray Media Completes Offering of $70 Million of Additional 7.250% Senior Secured First Lien Notes due 2033 and Repurchases $50 million of Series A Preferred Stock
data.description: Atlanta-based Gray Media, Inc. completed a private placement on June 30, 2026, securing $70 million through the issuance of 7.250% Senior Secured First Lien Notes due 2033. The Additional Notes were offered to accredited investors at par value plus accumulated interest starting from February 15, 2026. Gray Media, Inc. referred to as "Gray," successfully closed this financing round, emphasizing their commitment to growth and financial stability.

data.title: IFI Techsolutions Limited Renews Microsoft Azure Expert MSP Status for the Fourth Consecutive Year
data.description: In Mumbai, India, IFI Techsolutions Limited has successfully retained its Microsoft Azure Expert MSP status for the fourth year in a row. This achievement underscores the company's expertise in enterprise cloud services and commitment to maintaining high standards. By renewing this status, IFI Techsolutions Limited further solidifies its position as a reputable provider of cloud solutions, showcasing its proficiency in utilizing Microsoft Azure.

data.title: OXMIQ Raises $35 Million to Scale OxCore™ Architecture
data.description: A technology company based in Campbell, California, OXMIQ Labs Inc., founded by Raja Koduri, has successfully concluded a $35 million Series A funding round. This recent investment round has brought the total capital raised by the company to $60 million. The funding will primarily be used to expand OxCore™, OXMIQ’s licensable GPU architecture. This unique technology enables semiconductor companies and AI system developers to create personalized AI silicon without the need for a complete chip program. Fundomo and Samsung Catalyst Fund were the primary leaders in this funding round, with additional participation from MediaT.

data.title: Badger Meter Schedules Second Quarter 2026 Earnings Call
data.description: In Milwaukee, Badger Meter, Inc. (NYSE: BMI) has revealed plans to release its Q2 2026 earnings before the market opens on July 22, 2026. The company will conduct an earnings conference call at 10:00 am CT on the same day. A live webcast will be available for listening only through the Events & Presentations section of the company's investor relations website. Participants looking to engage in the call actively can do so.
